title: MailerLite vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and AWeber email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which suits your business best.
intro: Both MailerLite and AWeber are established email marketing platforms offering freemium models ideal for small businesses and solopreneurs. This comparison breaks down their pricing, features, and performance to help you choose the right tool for your needs.
choose_a_if: You need e-commerce integrations for selling products
You want a larger free tier with up to 1,000 subscribers
You prefer a modern drag-and-drop editor and pop-up builder
choose_b_if: You run a blog and need RSS-to-email automation
You're a long-time AWeber user satisfied with the platform
You need AMP email support for interactive messages

faq.a: MailerLite edges ahead for most users with better ratings, more features, lower starting prices, and superior e-commerce capabilities. However, AWeber remains a solid choice for bloggers needing RSS-to-email functionality and those preferring its established interface.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or AWeber?
faq.a: MailerLite is more affordable, starting at $9/month compared to AWeber's $15/month. Additionally, MailerLite's free tier supports 1,000 subscribers versus AWeber's 500, giving you more growth potential before paying.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list imports and exports. MailerLite provides migration assistance and integrations that can help transfer your contacts. Most users report a smooth transition, though you'll need to rebuild automation and template designs in MailerLite.
